name: LinkedIn Hiring Signal Scraper & Prospecting Tool
description: Scrapes LinkedIn job listing pages via Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract hiring signals and identify high-intent B2B leads, and saves structured results to Google Sheets with a prospecting summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's LinkedIn job listings scraper with Bright Data.

source.originalName: Scrape LinkedIn job listings for hiring signals & prospecting with Bright Data

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping job listings

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving results

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

searchUrls.description: Comma-separated LinkedIn job search URLs or company career page URLs to scrape

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for storing job listings

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for the prospecting summary

targetRoles.description: Comma-separated role keywords to filter (e.g. 'engineering manager, VP sales')

prospectingGoal.default: Identify companies with high hiring intent as potential B2B leads
prospectingGoal.description: What to look for in the hiring data

steps.name: Scrape job listing pages with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for hiring signal analysis
Run Claude AI hiring signal analysis
Build Sheets rows from listings and companies
Save hiring data to Google Sheets
